Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 1, 2025

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, fill out a form, or contact us for support.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, and send you technical notices and support messages.

3. Sharing of Information

We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this policy or with your consent.

4. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@example.com.
